reviewsSummary.note: Re-run (round 10). Validators pass. admin-citas-redesign (round 8), admin-usuarios-redesign (round 8), admin-dashboard-datasource-fix (this round) all reviewed and pass. admin-dashboard-redesign blocking issue fully resolved.

appliedUpdates.description: Added note about admin.bookings.list API relation behavior: it populates slot, staff, and (after fix d4b5c6b) request relations. Before the fix, only slot and staff were populated, causing dashboard to show staff email instead of citizen name.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance on commit size: prefer small, focused commits per feature. The admin-citas-redesign commit bundled 19 files with unrelated changes (routes, styles, components) making it hard to isolate feature changes during review.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: admin-citas-redesign review found git commit f2ee9c3 had 4248 insertions/2747 deletions across 19 unrelated files.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document CSS design token coverage: error/warning/info color scales only go up to *-600 in design-tokens.css. Components referencing *-700 tokens (e.g., --error-700) will fall back to browser defaults.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: admin-citas-redesign referenced --error-700, --warning-700, --info-700 in admin-schedule.css but these tokens are not defined.
